_meta.notes: Maps BUILD-SPEC element IDs to template element descriptions. Template Wix IDs (comp-xxx) TBD — discovered in editor. Gaps listed separately for manual placement.

mapping.breadcrumbHome: Breadcrumbs > Home link ('Home > All Products' nav)
mapping.categoryHeroSubtitle: Category description text (placeholder description under title)
mapping.filterColor: Filter by: Color checkboxes (14 color options)
mapping.gridSwatchPreview: Product card > Color variant swatch dots

gaps._comment: BUILD-SPEC elements NOT in template — need manual editor placement

heroSection.notes: Dynamic bg per category. Template has static breadcrumb area — need styled hero section.

filterBar.notes: Template has price + color filters only. We need brand (Night & Day, Strata...) and size (Full, Queen, Twin) dropdowns plus clear button.

advancedFacetedFilters.notes: Full faceted filter system powered by searchService.web.js. Template has basic price/color only.

mobileFilterDrawer.notes: Bottom sheet mobile filter UX. Template may have responsive mobile nav but not a dedicated filter drawer.

productCardExtras.notes: Template has basic badge + swatches. We need ribbon, fabric badge, review stars/count, compare button, and 4 individual swatch dots.

quickViewModal.notes: Template does NOT have quick view on category page (only on product page cross-sell). Full lightbox needed.

emptyState.notes: No empty state in template — shows full grid always. Need custom section for zero-product categories.

noMatchesState.notes: No filter-no-results state in template. Need custom section when advanced filters return zero.

recentlyViewed.notes: Not in template. Custom section below grid, collapsible, 6 items max.

activeFilterChips.notes: Removable badge chips for active filters. Not in template.

comparisonBar.notes: Sticky comparison bar for 2-4 selected products. Not in template.

schemaElements.notes: SEO JSON-LD and Open Graph meta injection. Not in template.

categorySidebar.notes: Template HAS a 'Browse by' sidebar (All Products, Sofas, Lounge Chairs, Tables, Chairs). Not in our BUILD-SPEC as a named element — consider adopting or repurposing.

templateExtras: Browse by sidebar nav (not in BUILD-SPEC — repurpose or adopt)
summary.coverage: ~23% element coverage, but template covers core commerce grid (breadcrumbs, filters, sort, product cards with badges/swatches/sale pricing). Major gaps are advanced filters, mobile drawer, quick view, empty/no-match states, comparison bar, recently viewed, filter chips, and SEO schema.
